IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_patients_inc', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_patients_inc;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_patients_inc
    @load_run_id VARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO silver.patients_inc
    (
        patient_id,
        patient_name,
        gender,
        created_at_utc,
        updated_at_utc,
        load_run_id
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(b.patient_id AS INT)                  AS patient_id,
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.patient_name)), '')       AS patient_name,
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.gender)), '')             AS gender,
        GETUTCDATE()                                   AS created_at_utc,
        GETUTCDATE()                                   AS updated_at_utc,
        @load_run_id                                   AS load_run_id
    FROM bronze.patients b
    WHERE NOT EXISTS
    (
        SELECT 1
        FROM silver.patients_inc s
        WHERE s.patient_id = TRY_CAST(b.patient_id AS INT)
    );
END;
GO



IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_visits_inc', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_visits_inc;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_visits_inc
    @load_run_id VARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO silver.visits_inc
    (
        visit_id,
        patient_id,
        visit_date,
        created_at_utc,
        updated_at_utc,
        load_run_id
    )
    SELECT
        d.visit_id,
        d.patient_id,
        d.visit_date,
        GETUTCDATE(),
        GETUTCDATE(),
        @load_run_id
    FROM staging.visits_delta d
    WHERE NOT EXISTS
    (
        SELECT 1
        FROM silver.visits_inc s
        WHERE s.visit_id = d.visit_id
    );

    UPDATE config.WatermarkControl
    SET
        LastProcessedValue =
        (
            SELECT MAX(CAST(visit_date AS DATETIME2))
            FROM staging.visits_delta
        ),
        LastRunId = @load_run_id,
        LastUpdatedAtUtc = GETUTCDATE()
    WHERE ProjectName = 'waittime'
      AND LoadType = 'INCREMENTAL'
      AND TargetTable = 'visits'
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM staging.visits_delta);
END;
GO
